title: YTPMV: Zelda races the evil King for dominance over Hyrule
description:
Bow before my incredible skill! Second YTPMV, and loads better than the first.

Yeah, the visuals are bland and suck a big fat cocksicle (well not really, but I got so tired trying to make grand visuals...), but we're here for the audio, right?

I did the audio in about 3 days, so I could've put this out a lot sooner, but making visuals is such a pain! So basicly you could've had this a week ago.

But anyways... enjoy it as it is. I'll try to make something more "grand" for the next one.

Boy bo-boy bo-bo-boy bo-boy...
